videos.title: I Let Open Source AI Drive Me to Work
videos.description:
Get a free 15-day trial of Odoo’s all-in-one business solution and see how it can make your life easier! Check it out at https://www.odoo.com/ltt

We were pretty impressed with the Comma 3x when we first tested it last year, so we decided to stick Linus in a Toyota Corolla long-term so he could test out the Comma AI’s active driver assistance over several months. There were some ups and downs!

Comma's supported cars list:  https://docs.comma.ai/CARS/

videos.title: What Is The Most Breakable PC Part?

videos.title: This Prototype Laptop Crushes Everything I’ve Ever Seen
videos.description:
Thanks to ASUS for sponsoring this video! Check out the the Strix SCAR 18 here: https://lmg.gg/IBcWH

We got an exclusive first look at the 2026 ASUS Strix SCAR 18. An absolute beast of a Laptop featuring top-tier hardware. Being a pre-production unit however, we had our hands tied and could only look at the display… Which also happens to be the best display a Laptop has ever seen.

Check out the last season of ROG Rig Reboot: https://lmg.gg/AWcFL

videos.description:
One pair for everyday and everywhere. Vessi claim their Weekend Sneaker is waterproof, lightweight, and built for daily wear and travel.

videos.title: This $5000 PC From Just Four Years Ago SUCKS
videos.description:
Thanks to Ridge for sponsoring this video! Head to https://Ridge.com/LTT and get something nice for your dad!

Just because Nvidia killed SLI, that doesn't mean it's over. With two RTX 3090 Tis in hand, we once again seek answers to questions like "just how bad was SLI?" and "should I buy a second RTX 3090 Ti?".

Discuss on the forum: https://linustechtips.com/topic/1637775-this-5000-pc-from-just-four-years-ago-sucks/

videos.title: We Ripped Up the Tech House Backyard
videos.description:
Click this link https://boot.dev/?promo=LTT and use my code LTT to get 25% off your first payment for boot.dev.

We’re stuck waiting for building permits at the Tech House, so in this episode we’re taking the action outside for some serious backyard demolition. Join the crew as we spend an afternoon prepping the yard for new landscaping, and watch out for Linus driving the mini-excavator because  you know destruction and chaos are practically guaranteed! 

Discuss on the forum: https://linustech

videos.title: Fixing My Employee’s House For a Day - The Setup Doctor
videos.description:
Click the link below to get an extra 6% off your Vernal desk.

US: https://bit.ly/4vOLHBs 
UK: https://bit.ly/4ddpANO 
DE: https://bit.ly/42zuYEP

LTT production hero Reece's setup is suffering from terrible cable management and a crappy desk. The Setup Doctor is in! We transformed his chaotic gaming and streaming space, shoe room and more - upgrading him with the sturdy Vernal Core3 L-shaped Standing Desk and custom accessories. Plus, we check out his unique hobby.
